days.summary: Work started the month with sidebar auto-collapse behavior, session statistics, notification infrastructure, GlobalSpotlight updates, dropdown/API cleanup, persistent temporary state, git refresh logic, and repository rule setup.
frontendChangeBullets: Added sidebar auto-collapse behavior so navigation can stay out of the way while users focus on active work.
Improved GlobalSpotlight discovery flows for quickly finding actions, sessions, shortcuts, and app destinations.
Refined notification presentation so request states, failures, and important feedback are easier to recognize.
Expanded session statistics visibility to help users understand activity and usage directly from the interface.
Polished dropdown interactions and API-facing controls so menus feel cleaner and more predictable.
backendChangeBullets: Added persistent temporary state handling so selected session and UI choices survive restarts more reliably.
Improved git refresh logic to provide fresher repository context after status changes.
Set up repository rule infrastructure to support clearer project-level behavior and automation boundaries.
Cleaned dropdown/API wiring to reduce stale state and make frontend requests easier to reason about.
Strengthened notification infrastructure for surfacing request and error states from runtime operations.

days.summary: Changes focused on the configurable sidebar, persistent session work, editor page polish, a global selector, and continued GlobalSpotlight refactoring with legacy cleanup and documentation tooling setup.
frontendChangeBullets: Made the sidebar more configurable so users can better tailor navigation to their workspace.
Polished editor page layouts to make code-focused surfaces feel cleaner and easier to scan.
Added a global selector pattern for switching important workspace context from a consistent control.
Continued GlobalSpotlight refactoring so launcher actions and search results feel more coherent.
Improved shared UI styling for buttons, colors, menus, and form controls across the workspace.
backendChangeBullets: Improved persistent session work so active workspace state is restored more consistently.
Cleaned old launcher and selection paths to reduce duplicated routing and session state behavior.
Added documentation tooling setup to support more reliable product and developer-facing docs generation.
Refined configuration paths behind the sidebar so saved navigation choices map cleanly to app state.
Reduced stale API surface area around GlobalSpotlight as the launcher architecture was consolidated.

days.summary: GlobalSpotlight and Cursor agent spotlight were expanded with terminal integration, badge counts, command shortcut fixes, repository synchronization, request/error notifications, and navigation/routing clarity improvements.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded GlobalSpotlight with richer actions so users can launch commands, sessions, and shortcuts faster.
Improved Cursor agent spotlight behavior with clearer entry points for agent-related actions.
Added terminal integration to spotlight flows so terminal-oriented actions are easier to reach.
Added badge counts to make outstanding activity and status signals visible at a glance.
Fixed command shortcut behavior and improved navigation clarity across launcher and route flows.
backendChangeBullets: Improved repository synchronization so project state is refreshed more accurately across the app.
Strengthened request and error notification plumbing for backend-driven operations.
Tightened terminal integration paths used by launcher actions and session workflows.
Improved git and repository status update flow so users see fresher project context.
Cleaned route configuration and command wiring to reduce inconsistencies between navigation and runtime actions.

days.summary: The app gained shortcut management, account configuration, embedded browser/webview support with multi-session handling, UI scaling and terminal customization, plus cleanup of unused code-server state and Storybook setup.
frontendChangeBullets: Added shortcut management so power users can review and adjust keyboard-driven workflows.
Improved account configuration screens for connecting and managing coding services more smoothly.
Added embedded browser and webview support for richer in-app browsing and automation experiences.
Improved multi-session webview handling so embedded browsing works more reliably across sessions.
Added UI scaling and terminal customization controls to make the desktop workspace more comfortable.
backendChangeBullets: Cleaned unused code-server state to simplify embedded development runtime behavior.
Added Storybook setup to support isolated review of shared components and UI states.
Improved webview runtime handling for multiple sessions and embedded browser windows.
Strengthened shortcut configuration storage so desktop commands can be managed consistently.
Connected account configuration paths more clearly to the services and providers used at runtime.

days.summary: Session history, tab management, routing, persistence, and file page behavior were tightened while documentation components, context menus, command shortcuts, issue modals, and utility organization were improved.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved session history so users can revisit previous work more easily.
Tightened tab management to make opening, closing, and switching workspace views more predictable.
Improved file page behavior so file-oriented routes feel more stable and consistent.
Polished documentation components and context menus for clearer in-app reference and actions.
Refined issue modals and command shortcut surfaces to support faster review workflows.
backendChangeBullets: Improved persistence for session history, tab state, and UI selections across restarts.
Cleaned routing infrastructure so tab and page state map more reliably to saved workspace context.
Reorganized shared utilities to reduce duplication in session, tab, and file handling.
Strengthened command shortcut wiring so UI actions invoke the intended runtime behavior.
Tightened file page data flow to reduce stale state during navigation and reloads.

days.summary: Replay Demo and Activity Simulator work accelerated with selection toolbars, performance monitoring, UUID validation, centralized repo management, API integration, data cleanup, and layout/style consistency updates.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded Replay Demo and Activity Simulator views so agent progress is easier to inspect.
Added selection toolbars for faster interaction with simulator content and replayed activity.
Improved layout and style consistency across replay, simulator, and shared UI surfaces.
Added performance monitoring presentation so simulator responsiveness is easier to evaluate.
Improved playback and inspection tools for reviewing agent actions step by step.
backendChangeBullets: Added UUID validation to make simulator and replay data handling safer.
Centralized repository management paths used by simulator and replay workflows.
Improved API integration for activity simulation and replay data loading.
Cleaned simulator data handling to reduce stale or inconsistent replay records.
Added performance tracking hooks that help measure simulator rendering and data processing behavior.

days.summary: Activity Simulator rendering matured with richer event handling, file creation views, conversation history, memoized event components, and a CodeMirror-based code/diff display replacing older lightweight viewers.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved Activity Simulator rendering with richer event handling for replayed agent activity.
Added file creation views so created files are easier to understand during replay.
Improved conversation history display for reviewing how an agent session unfolded.
Replaced older lightweight code viewers with CodeMirror-based code and diff displays.
Memoized event components to make long activity streams feel more responsive.
backendChangeBullets: Refined simulator event data handling to support richer replay event types.
Improved file creation event modeling so new-file activity can be rendered accurately.
Optimized replay rendering paths by reducing unnecessary event component recalculation.
Improved code and diff data flow for CodeMirror-backed displays.
Strengthened conversation history handling so replayed activity stays aligned with session records.

days.summary: Replay, trajectory, session switching, pin-question, dock, and Activity Simulator features were expanded while CodeMirror performance, file diff unification, Workflow API documentation, and event component navigation improved.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded replay and trajectory views so users can follow agent work with more context.
Improved session switching behavior for moving between active and replayed work.
Added pin-question and dock interactions to keep important context close while reviewing activity.
Unified file diff presentation for clearer code review and navigation.
Improved event component navigation so replay details are easier to jump through.
backendChangeBullets: Improved CodeMirror performance for large replay and diff displays.
Unified file diff data paths to reduce inconsistent handling between review surfaces.
Added Workflow API documentation support around replay and trajectory-related workflows.
Refined session switching state so replay, dock, and trajectory data stay synchronized.
Strengthened Activity Simulator data flow for richer event navigation and inspection.

days.summary: Native file search, @ mention dropdowns, tab drag-and-drop, window preloading, Explore routing, background image optimization, code-server setup, and sidebar/repo list styling were added around the refactor-session merge.
frontendChangeBullets: Added native file search so users can find project files directly inside ORGII.
Improved @ mention dropdowns for faster insertion of files, symbols, and workspace context.
Added tab drag-and-drop improvements for more natural workspace organization.
Refined Explore routing to make discovery-oriented pages easier to reach.
Polished sidebar and repository list styling for clearer project navigation.
backendChangeBullets: Added native file search support behind the UI for faster project context lookup.
Improved window preloading so app pages and workspace views appear more quickly.
Optimized background image handling to reduce load cost and improve responsiveness.
Set up code-server integration paths for embedded development workflows.
Integrated refactor-session work to improve session state and routing foundations.

days.summary: Header/layout standardization and LiquidGlass visual work dominated, including global configuration, lazy blur, adaptive colors, macOS tab/header compatibility, local storage optimization, and initial session/API updates.
frontendChangeBullets: Standardized header and layout patterns so pages align more consistently across ORGII.
Expanded LiquidGlass visuals with adaptive colors and cleaner translucent surfaces.
Improved lazy blur behavior so glass effects feel smoother and less expensive.
Refined macOS tab and header compatibility for a more native desktop feel.
Improved settings and configuration screens so saved controls are clearer.
backendChangeBullets: Added global configuration support for shared LiquidGlass and layout behavior.
Optimized local storage usage to reduce unnecessary persistence overhead.
Started session and API updates that align layout state with runtime session data.
Improved compatibility handling for macOS header and tab runtime constraints.
Reduced rendering cost by moving blur-heavy effects behind lazy and shared configuration.

days.summary: Liquid Glass updates continued across inputs, chat, headers, and sidebars while git status cache refresh, layout refinements, .gitignore hardening, component import cleanup, and sidebar polish progressed.
frontendChangeBullets: Continued Liquid Glass polish across inputs, chat surfaces, headers, and sidebars.
Improved sidebar visuals so navigation feels cleaner and more consistent.
Refined layout spacing and component imports to reduce visual inconsistencies.
Added automatic git status refresh feedback so repository state feels more current.
Polished shared controls for more consistent buttons, menus, and input states.
backendChangeBullets: Improved git status cache refresh behavior so repository changes are picked up automatically.
Hardened ignore-file handling to keep generated or unwanted files out of project workflows.
Cleaned component import paths to reduce bundle and dependency noise.
Improved cache handling around git status so stale repository data is less likely.
Refined layout infrastructure supporting Liquid Glass effects across multiple surfaces.

days.summary: Session sidebar/realtime integration, Create Session and recent sessions, sidebar separation, embedded VSCode theme experiments, Code Search with Tantivy and semantic search, Qdrant/logging fixes, GGUF Metal support, and webpack improvements landed.
frontendChangeBullets: Added a session sidebar with workspace integration for easier access to active work.
Added Create Session sidebar flows and recent sessions for quicker session starts.
Improved sidebar separation so navigation, session creation, and workspace context feel distinct.
Added Code Search with advanced navigation and symbol search for project exploration.
Experimented with embedded VSCode theming to make in-app editing surfaces feel more integrated.
backendChangeBullets: Integrated realtime session sidebar data so live workspace context can update in the UI.
Added Code Search indexing with Tantivy and semantic search foundations.
Fixed Qdrant and logging behavior involved in search and embedding workflows.
Added GGUF Metal support for local model-related runtime paths.
Improved webpack configuration for better frontend build and development behavior.

days.summary: Code Search indexing and embedding workflows were optimized with better batching, context management, path normalization, repository removal for indices, refined result/input layouts, and additional home routes and breadcrumbs.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined Code Search result layouts so matches are easier to scan and open.
Improved Code Search input layouts for a smoother query experience.
Added home routes and breadcrumbs to make search and workspace navigation clearer.
Improved performance metric visibility around embedding and indexing activity.
Polished workflow-oriented layouts so related search and navigation paths feel connected.
backendChangeBullets: Optimized Code Search indexing with better batching for larger repositories.
Improved embedding workflows with stronger context management and performance tracking.
Normalized paths more consistently so search results map cleanly to repository files.
Added repository removal support for search indices to keep stale data out of results.
Improved embedding process performance so indexing can complete with less overhead.

days.summary: The component updates branch expanded the UI library with Button, Slider, demos, and structural cleanup while replacing LiquidGlassButton usages, fixing tab and z-index issues, and improving repo branch dropdowns.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded the component library with Button and Slider components for more consistent UI building blocks.
Added component demos to make shared controls easier to review and validate.
Replaced LiquidGlassButton usage with ButtonGlass across the application.
Fixed tab and z-index issues that could make layered UI elements behave incorrectly.
Improved repository branch dropdowns so branch selection is clearer and easier to use.
backendChangeBullets: Cleaned component structure to reduce duplicated visual primitives and styling paths.
Updated shared component exports so ButtonGlass can serve as the common glass button surface.
Improved tab infrastructure behind layered UI and z-index handling.
Refined repository branch data wiring used by branch dropdowns.
Strengthened component demo tooling so shared controls can be reviewed in isolation.

days.summary: A large component/sidebar updates standardized Lucide icons, button/input layouts, top bar heights, routing, tab management, UnifiedExtraSidebar usage, GlobalToolbar behavior, and removal of deprecated CodeEditor/layout selector code.
frontendChangeBullets: Standardized Lucide icon usage to make the interface more visually consistent.
Refined button and input layouts across broad component and sidebar surfaces.
Standardized top bar heights so page headers and toolbars align more predictably.
Improved UnifiedExtraSidebar usage for more consistent secondary navigation panels.
Refined GlobalToolbar behavior to make workspace actions easier to access.
backendChangeBullets: Cleaned routing and tab management infrastructure during the component/sidebar update.
Removed deprecated CodeEditor paths to simplify editor-related dependencies.
Removed old layout selector code so view-mode handling is less fragmented.
Updated shared component naming and exports to support broader sidebar consistency.
Reduced unused UI infrastructure that no longer matched the current workspace architecture.

days.summary: GlobalSpotlight, sidebar, TitleBar, SimpleRepoBranchSelector, tab closability, workspace mode, Git Diff, and toolbar connection handling were refined while broad component renames and deprecated EHeader removal continued.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved GlobalSpotlight behavior for faster command and destination discovery.
Refined TitleBar and sidebar interactions for cleaner desktop navigation.
Improved SimpleRepoBranchSelector so repository and branch context is easier to change.
Added tab closability improvements for more predictable workspace cleanup.
Improved Git Diff and toolbar connection states for clearer code review workflows.
backendChangeBullets: Refined workspace mode state used by routing, tabs, and toolbar behavior.
Improved branch and repository data flow behind SimpleRepoBranchSelector.
Cleaned broad component names and removed deprecated EHeader infrastructure.
Strengthened toolbar connection handling so runtime state appears accurately in the UI.
Improved file and folder synchronization paths tied to workspace navigation.

days.summary: New Git API endpoints and repo API updates work were integrated with updated repo/branch selectors, TabManager and ButtonGlass polish, LiquidGlass consolidation, and visual consistency improvements.
frontendChangeBullets: Updated repository and branch selectors to work with the new Git service endpoints.
Polished TabManager interactions for more consistent tab behavior.
Improved ButtonGlass visual consistency across shared controls.
Consolidated LiquidGlass usage so glass styling feels more unified.
Refined Git-related views to present repository and branch status more clearly.
backendChangeBullets: Integrated new Git API endpoints for repository and branch operations.
Updated repository API usage to align frontend selectors with backend Git services.
Improved branch data fetching so selectors can reflect current repository state.
Consolidated LiquidGlass implementation paths to reduce duplicated rendering behavior.
Refactored Git-related view data flow around the new service endpoints.

days.summary: Work centered on tab/view-mode management, session events, terminal output cleanup, repo refresh and triple-mode repo spotlight, Git status/diff integration, Start session naming, and sidebar component unification.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved tab and view-mode management so workspace layouts stay in sync.
Refined session event presentation for clearer live activity feedback.
Cleaned terminal output display to make command results easier to read.
Expanded triple-mode repository spotlight so users can act on repositories faster.
Unified sidebar components for more consistent navigation and workspace context.
backendChangeBullets: Improved repository refresh behavior so spotlight and Git status surfaces receive current data.
Integrated Git status and diff data more tightly with session and repository workflows.
Cleaned terminal output handling to reduce noisy or duplicated runtime text.
Improved session event infrastructure used by live activity and view-mode updates.
Refined Start session naming and data paths for clearer session creation behavior.

days.summary: Git suggestions and actions became a first-class UI surface with GitActionsButton, GitDiff integration, global git status state, repo-status to git-status naming changes, view-mode synchronization, code-server updates, and unified event work.
frontendChangeBullets: Made Git suggestions and actions a first-class UI surface through GitActionsButton.
Integrated GitSuggestionsWidget into GitDiff for clearer code review guidance.
Improved global git status state display so repository conditions are easier to understand.
Polished Git Diff views with stronger file navigation and review affordances.
Improved view-mode synchronization so Git and session views stay aligned.
backendChangeBullets: Renamed repo-status concepts to git-status to better match the underlying domain.
Improved global git status state management for shared repository updates.
Updated code-server integration paths alongside Git and session event work.
Unified event handling used by Git suggestions, diffs, and session status updates.
Strengthened Git action plumbing so suggestions can connect to actionable repository operations.

days.summary: Routing and tab infrastructure were reorganized into a new hierarchy, circular dependencies were broken, session list virtualization and loading improved, Git/Session request deduplication was added, and tab mode/sidebar/webview behavior was refined.
frontendChangeBullets: Reorganized routing and tab hierarchy so navigation feels more predictable.
Improved session list virtualization for smoother browsing of larger session sets.
Added clearer loading states around sessions and tabs.
Refined sidebar and tab mode behavior for more coherent workspace layouts.
Improved webview behavior inside tabbed workspace flows.
backendChangeBullets: Broke circular dependencies in routing and tab infrastructure to improve maintainability.
Added Git and session request deduplication to reduce redundant backend calls.
Improved data loading behind virtualized session lists.
Refined webview state handling so browser content aligns with tab mode changes.
Reorganized route infrastructure into a cleaner hierarchy for future workspace flows.

days.summary: LiquidGlass demo and toolbar experiments were added then cleaned up, webp/background image handling and routing were fixed, code search tab creation improved, and selection widgets gained floating Add to Chat interactions.
frontendChangeBullets: Added a Glass Demo route for experimenting with LiquidGlass toolbar and layout behavior.
Integrated toolbar view experiments into the glass demo workflow.
Improved .webp image support for richer background and visual assets.
Added manual resizing to the GlassDemo view for easier layout testing.
Added floating Add to Chat interactions on selection widgets.
backendChangeBullets: Fixed background image handling for .webp assets.
Improved routing support for demo and code search tab creation.
Cleaned experimental LiquidGlass demo and toolbar code after validating layout behavior.
Improved code search tab creation logic so search results open more reliably.
Refined selection widget data flow for adding selected content into chat context.

days.summary: GlobalToolbar was modularized around LiquidGlassToolbar and dynamic sections, Soyd was restructured, GlobalSpotlight positioning and sitemap updates were refined, tab/editor detection improved, and resume/view-mode synchronization work began.
frontendChangeBullets: Modularized GlobalToolbar around LiquidGlassToolbar for more flexible action sections.
Added dynamic toolbar sections so workspace actions can adapt to context.
Refined GlobalSpotlight positioning so the launcher appears in a better location.
Improved sitemap updates for clearer app destination discovery.
Improved tab and editor detection so toolbar and view state match the active workspace.
backendChangeBullets: Restructured Soyd-related code to better separate toolbar, routing, and workspace concerns.
Improved sitemap data generation used by GlobalSpotlight and navigation surfaces.
Refined tab/editor detection logic that synchronizes runtime state with UI actions.
Started resume and view-mode synchronization work to keep session state consistent.
Modularized toolbar infrastructure so dynamic sections can be registered and updated cleanly.

days.summary: Resume and marketplace work merged with fixes for command shortcuts, replay, routing, database/usage pages, global shortcuts, GlobalSpotlight action templates, Git stash APIs, marketplace API guides, role-based navigation, and Recharts-backed marketplace UI.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved resume flows so users can return to previous work more smoothly.
Expanded marketplace UI with clearer listings, usage pages, and Recharts-backed visuals.
Fixed command shortcuts and GlobalSpotlight action templates for faster workflows.
Improved replay and routing behavior so activity review and navigation are more reliable.
Added role-based navigation so pages can better match the user's context.
backendChangeBullets: Added Git stash APIs to support repository workflows from ORGII.
Expanded marketplace API guides and integration paths for listing and usage features.
Improved database and usage page data flows behind marketplace reporting.
Strengthened global shortcut infrastructure for command and workspace actions.
Integrated resume-related runtime work with routing and session state updates.

days.summary: Consumer Marketplace, Usage Analytics, API calls tracking, background image caching, repository management through GlobalSpotlight, SuggestionsPage updates, and diff/session fixes were expanded with significant cleanup and performance tuning.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded Consumer Marketplace flows for browsing and managing model access.
Added Usage Analytics and API call tracking views for clearer consumption visibility.
Improved repository management through GlobalSpotlight actions.
Updated SuggestionsPage so recommendation and action surfaces feel more useful.
Improved diff and session UI fixes for smoother review and workspace continuity.
backendChangeBullets: Added API call tracking support behind usage analytics surfaces.
Improved background image caching to reduce repeated asset loading.
Expanded marketplace data paths for consumer listings, transactions, and usage views.
Improved repository management actions invoked through GlobalSpotlight.
Tuned performance across diff, session, and marketplace data flows.

days.summary: A heavy cleanup and integration day added incognito/new-window browser handling, target blank interception, repo selector tabs, Cursor login/credential capture webviews, diagnostics and dependency updates, while removing Babel/settings artifacts, GitGraph, Replay Demo, legacy exports, and unused components.
frontendChangeBullets: Added incognito and new-window browser handling for more complete embedded browsing workflows.
Intercepted target blank links so external pages behave predictably inside ORGII.
Added repository selector tabs for clearer switching between repository contexts.
Added Cursor login and token capture webviews for smoother account setup.
Polished shared components while removing unused Replay Demo, GitGraph, and settings surfaces.
backendChangeBullets: Improved embedded browser window management for incognito sessions and new-window events.
Added target blank interception handling at the webview integration layer.
Updated diagnostics and dependency tooling to improve development feedback.
Removed Babel artifacts and unused generated surfaces to simplify the toolchain.
Cleaned old exports, API surfaces, and unused components to reduce runtime and build complexity.

days.summary: Component and hook cleanup continued at scale with projectPath to repoPath naming, bidirectional toolbar/editor sync, Marketplace Auth API/UI, development server logging, modal/project management consolidation, Lucide updates, ActivitySimulator renaming, and removal of deprecated API/docs/components.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved bidirectional toolbar and editor synchronization so controls reflect the active editing state.
Added Marketplace Auth UI for connecting marketplace-related account flows.
Consolidated modal and project management surfaces for a cleaner workspace experience.
Updated Lucide icon usage across components for visual consistency.
Renamed ActivitySimulator-facing UI surfaces for clearer product language.
backendChangeBullets: Renamed projectPath concepts to repoPath in relevant code paths for clearer repository identity.
Added Marketplace Auth API support behind the new account connection UI.
Improved development server logging so local runtime issues are easier to diagnose.
Removed deprecated APIs, documentation surfaces, and components no longer used by current workflows.
Consolidated component and hook structure to reduce duplicated state and runtime logic.

days.summary: PR Studio and legacy UI surfaces were removed in favor of session/repo/context APIs, DevTools and documentation were restructured, GitDiff gained cherry-picking and virtualized diff performance work, SessionWorkspaceContext landed, and provider onboarding APIs/pages were added.
frontendChangeBullets: Removed PR Studio and older UI surfaces in favor of session, repository, and context workflows.
Improved GitDiff with cherry-picking support for more focused code review actions.
Improved virtualized diff performance so large diffs are easier to review.
Added provider onboarding pages so account setup can be guided more clearly.
Restructured DevTools and documentation views for cleaner navigation.
backendChangeBullets: Added SessionWorkspaceContext to centralize session and repository context data.
Added provider onboarding APIs behind the new setup pages.
Replaced older PR Studio data paths with session, repository, and context APIs.
Improved GitDiff backend data handling for cherry-picking and large diff virtualization.
Restructured developer tooling and documentation infrastructure around current workspace APIs.

days.summary: Git status architecture was overhauled with event-driven repo watching, singleton context management, rate-limited logging, path filtering, ahead/behind metrics, Rust HTTP Git API integration, repository ID/path handling, and sidebar connector patterns.
frontendChangeBullets: Added event-driven git status updates so repository changes appear more quickly.
Improved sidebar connector patterns for cleaner repository status presentation.
Added ahead and behind metrics to make branch state easier to understand.
Improved repository watching feedback so users see fresher project context.
Refined navigation around repository status and multi-repo state.
backendChangeBullets: Overhauled Git status architecture with event-driven repository watching.
Added singleton context management for shared Git status state.
Added rate-limited logging around frequent repository status updates.
Added path filtering so repository watchers avoid unnecessary work.
Integrated Rust HTTP Git API support with repository ID and path handling.

days.summary: Git backend work deepened with git2 diff/blame, repo_path support, current branch endpoint, streamlined command I/O, simplified status management, hot-reload/branch-switch fixes, real-time repo registration, plus consumer billing pages, P2P collaboration, notifications, and cloud/local session UI groundwork.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded consumer billing pages so users can better understand marketplace and usage costs.
Added P2P collaboration UI groundwork for future shared workspace experiences.
Improved notifications for request status and important workflow feedback.
Added cloud and local session UI groundwork to distinguish different session execution contexts.
Improved code review surfaces with Git diff and blame-related context.
backendChangeBullets: Deepened Git backend support with git2-powered diff and blame capabilities.
Added repo_path support for Git operations that need explicit repository context.
Added a current branch endpoint so frontend selectors can query branch state directly.
Streamlined command I/O for Git runtime operations.
Improved real-time repository registration and fixed hot-reload and branch-switch behavior.

days.summary: Memory and performance optimization continued through LiquidGlassRenderer and SharedGlassRenderer changes, sidecar binary renaming, Tauri plugin updates, MultiRepoGitStatusContext, Git abort/debounce handling, TiptapInput integration, process cleanup scripts, context menu browser tab support, and session discovery/debug cleanup.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved LiquidGlassRenderer and SharedGlassRenderer behavior to reduce memory pressure.
Integrated TiptapInput for richer chat and text entry experiences.
Added browser tab support to context menus for smoother navigation from actions.
Improved session discovery and debug cleanup for clearer workspace state.
Polished routes and tabs so navigation feels more predictable.
backendChangeBullets: Renamed sidecar binaries as part of runtime packaging cleanup.
Updated Tauri plugins to improve desktop runtime integration.
Added MultiRepoGitStatusContext for managing Git status across multiple repositories.
Improved Git abort and debounce handling to reduce redundant or stuck operations.
Added process cleanup scripts to keep local development and runtime processes healthier.

days.summary: The year closed with cloud session support merging, IDEConnectionManager and WebSocket handling, chat panel/state architecture consolidation, repo onboarding via spotlight actions, Cursor credential fixes, Claude Code listing UI, GlobalDragDrop/input improvements, agent appearance simplification, accessibility/styling updates, and comment/variable naming cleanup.
frontendChangeBullets: Added cloud session support to help users work with remotely backed session flows.
Consolidated chat panel and state architecture for a cleaner conversation experience.
Added repository onboarding through spotlight actions so users can start from command search.
Improved Claude Code listing UI for clearer marketplace browsing.
Improved GlobalDragDrop and input interactions while simplifying agent appearance controls.
backendChangeBullets: Integrated IDEConnectionManager and WebSocket handling for cloud and IDE-connected sessions.
Fixed Cursor token handling paths involved in account and session setup.
Improved repository onboarding runtime actions triggered from GlobalSpotlight.
Cleaned comment and variable naming to make session and agent code easier to maintain.
Strengthened accessibility and styling infrastructure while consolidating chat state data flow.
